allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./packages/interactive-mcp/package.json'\); console.log\('ink version:', pkg.dependencies?.ink || pkg.devDependencies?.ink\)")

Bash(node -e "const ink = require\('./packages/interactive-mcp/node_modules/ink'\); console.log\('Static exported:', typeof ink.Static\); console.log\('ink version actual:', require\('./packages/interactive-mcp/node_modules/ink/package.json'\).version\)")
Bash(node -e "const ink = require\('ink'\); console.log\('Static exported:', typeof ink.Static\); console.log\('ink version actual:', require\('./node_modules/ink/package.json'\).version\)")
